if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM esg.tb_company_info tci WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY tci.use_yn desc, tci.comp_id desc LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT tci2.* FROM esg.tb_client_info tci LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_client_map tccm on tci.clnt_id = tccm.clnt_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_company_info tci2 on tccm.comp_id = tci2.comp_id WHERE 1=1 AND tci.clnt_id = #{clntId} AND tci.use_yn = 'Y' AND tci2.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tci2.ord_seq asc, tci2.comp_id asc;

SELECT b.comp_id, c.comp_nm FROM esg.tb_user_info a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map b on a.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_company_info c on b.comp_id = c.comp_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND b.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY orgn_comp_yn desc, c.ord_seq asc, comp_nm asc;
SELECT * FROM esg.tb_company_info tci WHERE 1=1 AND tci.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tci.comp_id asc;

SELECT a.*, b.orgn_comp_yn FROM esg.tb_company_info a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map b on a.comp_id = b.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info c on b.user_id = c.user_id WHERE a.use_yn = 'Y' AND c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY orgn_comp_yn desc, a.ord_seq asc, comp_nm asc;
SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_company_info tci WHERE 1=1
SELECT *, sf.file_id as file_id FROM esg.tb_company_info tci LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = #{compId} and sf.target_type='compLogo' WHERE 1=1 AND tci.comp_id = #{compId}

SELECT tci2.clnt_id as id, tci2.clnt_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_company_info tci LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_client_map tccm on tci.comp_id = tccm.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_client_info tci2 on tccm.clnt_id = tci2.clnt_id WHERE 1=1 AND tci.comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(comp_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as comp_id from esg.tb_company_info where comp_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%';
INSERT INTO esg.tb_company_info ( comp_id, comp_nm, rgst_no, rpst_nm, email, tel_no, biz_cd, biz_nm, const_class_cd, const_class_nm, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2, ord_seq, created_at, created_by, use_yn, max_hr_count ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{compNm}, #{rgstNo}, #{rpstNm}, #{email}, #{telNo}, #{bizCd}, #{bizNm}, #{constClassCd}, #{constClassNm}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy}, 'Y', #{maxHrCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_company_info SET comp_nm = #{compNm}, rgst_no = #{rgstNo}, rpst_nm = #{rpstNm}, email = #{email}, tel_no = #{telNo}, biz_cd = #{bizCd}, biz_nm = #{bizNm}, const_class_cd = #{constClassCd}, const_class_nm = #{constClassNm}, zip_cd = #{zipCd}, addrs1 = #{addrs1}, addrs2 = #{addrs2}, use_yn = #{useYn}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, max_hr_count = #{maxHrCount} WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE esg.tb_company_info SET use_yn = 'N', updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_company_info tci WHERE 1=1 AND 1 = 1 AND tci.comp_id = #{compId}
